User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account with basic profile information within the VOID WEAR application. Does not store authentication credentials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address, used for communication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account information was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual product available for sale in the 'VOID WEAR' app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product, including features and materials.

price.description: The current selling price of the product.

currency.description: The currency of the product price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs to product images, showcasing different views or details.

category.description: The primary category of the product (e.g., 'Tops', 'Bottoms', 'Accessories').

stockQuantity.description: The number of units of this product currently available in stock.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was first added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product information was last updated.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a user's active shopping cart, containing selected products before checkout.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this cart. (Relationship: User 1:N Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the shopping cart was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the cart was last updated (e.g., items added, removed, or quantities adjusted).

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product entry within a user's shopping cart, specifying the product and its quantity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the Cart this item belongs to. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product included in this cart item. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in this specific cart item.

addedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this item was added to the cart.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a confirmed customer purchase, containing overall transaction details and references to ordered items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed and confirmed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including taxes and shipping.

currency.description: The currency of the total order amount (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

status.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'processed', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

shippingAddress.description: The full shipping address where the order will be delivered.

billingAddress.description: The full billing address associated with the payment method for the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order record was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order record was last updated (e.g., status change).

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product within a confirmed order, capturing its state (price, quantity) at the time of purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product that was purchased as part of this order item. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product included in this order item.

priceAtOrder.description: The unit price of the product at the exact moment the order was placed.

currency.description: The currency of the price at order (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Access is restricted to the owner matching `request.auth.uid` or the Master Admin.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, typically matching Firebase Authentication's `uid`.

definition.description: Stores details of all products available in the store. This collection is publicly readable, while write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for a product.

definition.description: Global application configuration for dynamic branding and settings. Publicly readable, admin writable.
Brand narrative updates and announcements. Publicly readable, admin writable.

params.name: storyId
params.description: Unique identifier for a story transmission.

definition.description: Customer feedback for products. Publicly readable, authenticated user writable.
Represents a user's active shopping cart. Nested under the user's document to enforce ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this cart.

params.name: cartId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific shopping cart.

definition.description: Represents a user's confirmed purchase order. Restricted to owner or Admin.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who placed this order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific order.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to be secure and scalable. Hierarchical paths ensure authorization is tied to the document location. Top-level collections like products and app_config use public read permissions for fast, unauthenticated access on the landing page, while the Master Admin role handles global database maintenance.
